title: Gin Is Torn Between Krieg and Sanji
description: On pages 1–4, the fight against Krieg reaches a moral breaking point as Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy clash over debt, survival, and strength.
scene: Krieg’s weapons and cruelty force everyone at the Baratie to reveal what they truly value: victory, loyalty, survival, or protecting someone else’s dream.

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: Repay his debt...!?

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: Sanji! Don't do any more unnecessary things.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: I'm not so old and feeble enough yet that I need to be rescued by a little eggplant!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Hmph, you're one to talk.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: If you hadn't given up your leg for my sake, then these guys wouldn't be able to push you around!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji's barely standing...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So owner Zeff gave up his leg,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to save Sanji...?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Then the reason why he's stayed here all along,

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: must've been to repay his debt to owner Zeff...!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Never would've imagined that two people who argue with each other all the time would share such a deep relationship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why do you still stand up, Sanji...!?

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Haaaaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: Still haven't had enough of my Pearl presents!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You ain't got a chance of winning!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: The final result is all that matters in this world! If you lose, then you're a loser! No other way about it!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter if you take Hostages! The last man standing is the victor!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, Don Krieg!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Exactly.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Right, gin!?

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Guess it's not even necessary to ask...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: you are the one holding him at hostage, after all...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: In any case, you'll lose without laying even a finger on us in the end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So why do you still stand!? You'll only be beaten to a bloody pulp if you do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I want to preserve this restaurant,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If even just one second longer.

summary: This part pushes the Baratie battle toward its climax by contrasting Krieg’s ruthless power with Luffy and Sanji’s stubborn ideals.
